paper_section: §3 Results, EML expression catalog (x × y, K=41)
informal_pl: Istnieje 2-zmienny term EML rozmiaru 41 ewaluujący do x · y dla x, y > 0 (Identity 1). Stwierdzenie istnieniowe.
informal_en: There exists a two-variable EML term of size 41 whose evaluation equals x · y for x, y > 0 (Identity 1). Existential.
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm2_for_mul : ∃ t : EMLTerm₂, ∀ x y : ℝ, 0 < x → 0 < y → EMLTerm₂.eval x y t = x * y := by sorry
notes: Positivity needed; the negative-x cases would expand the K. K=41 / K=17.
